title: Roasted Savoy Peruvian Cabbage Seco
description: A garlicky, bouncy QQ post-workout Peruvian dish featuring Savoy cabbage, cure, and low-sodium options. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner after a workout.
instructions: Chop the savoy cabbage into small pieces and set aside.
Mince the garlic and add it to the chopped cabbage.
In a small bowl, mix together the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add the spice mixture. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped cabbage and garlic to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cure, chicken broth, cilantro, and lemon juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a copper mug or other heatproof vessel and roast in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20 minutes.
While the cabbage is roasting, heat the coconut oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
After the cabbage has roasted for 20 minutes, remove it from the oven and stir in the heated coconut oil.
Serve the cabbage hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Let the dish cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for later use.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
